stories.title: Convert collections page into a list-first workbench
stories.scope: Restructure `/business/collections` into a compact workbench with short header, action rail, list-first task area, and supporting diagnostics while preserving collection run, enrichment rerun, and runtime check actions.
stories.nonGoals: Do not add backend behavior, new data sources, or broad shell changes.
acceptance: Collections page uses a workbench layout instead of a dashboard-first card wall.
Run, rerun enrichment, and runtime check actions remain reachable.
Task list and runtime state are visually prioritized over description text.

sourcePrd.releaseGate: User explicitly requested generating the long task for all remaining pages.

stories.title: Reframe outreach page as a list-detail workbench
stories.scope: Rework `/business/outreach` into a stable workbench that keeps status filters, message deep links, task list, detail panel, and draft workspace, but makes the list-detail rhythm clearer and the draft tools secondary to the task queue.
stories.nonGoals: Do not redesign outreach business semantics or remove existing draft recovery capability.
acceptance: Outreach page presents task queue first and detail/editor as supporting areas.
Message focus and notice-contact filters remain functional.
Draft restore and save affordances remain available without dominating the page header.
notes: Keep URL query handling and restore receipts intact.

sourcePrd.releaseGate: User explicitly requested generating the long task for all remaining pages.

stories.title: Turn radar page into an opportunity queue workbench
stories.scope: Refocus `/business/radar` around the radar opportunity queue, selected detail, and high-value actions, while demoting external search/import tooling into a supporting region and preserving take-over, outreach creation, and message deep links.
stories.nonGoals: Do not change radar scoring logic or backend import semantics.
acceptance: Radar page is visibly queue-first rather than tool-first.
Selected item detail and takeover/outreach actions remain easy to reach.
External import/search stays available as an auxiliary area.
notes: Preserve score/take-status filters and message-center focus behavior.

sourcePrd.releaseGate: User explicitly requested generating the long task for all remaining pages.
